message:
fix(core): miscellaneous clippy fixes and code hygiene across frankenterm-core

- Suppress clippy::unused_self on check_find_safety in ars_symbolic_exec
- Prefix unused variable with underscore in config_profiles
- Collapse multi-line iterator chains in crash_persistence_gate,
  fleet_memory_controller, and process_triage
- Use saturating_mul instead of checked_mul(...).unwrap_or(usize::MAX)
  in xor_filter
- Reformat test array literals and assertion macros in
  traceability_verification and survival

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
